entity.label: Middin
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Measures, one of the six cities “in the wilderness,” on the west of the Dead Sea, mentioned along with En-gedi (Josh. 15:61).

nodes.label: Middin
nodes.description: Measures, one of the six cities “in the wilderness,” on the west of the Dead Sea, mentioned along with En-gedi (Josh. 15:61).

verses.text: In the wilderness, Betharabah, Middin, and Secacah,
